Localization.Description: An x.509 certificate is matched or not matched

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The x.509 certificate is not matched when user {datafield3} connected to device {datafield5} via {protocol.layer7} protocol on host {dst.host}
The x.509 certificate is matched when user {datafield3} connected to device {datafield5} via {protocol.layer7} protocol on host {dst.host}
